name: BB:UBA : Kerberos Authentication Failures
notes: Detects Kerberos authentication ticket was rejected or failed.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Kerberos Authentication Failures on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of UBA : Trusted Log Source Group
when the event QID is one of the following (5000581) Failure Audit: A Kerberos authentication ticket (TGT) was rejected, (5000584) Failure Audit: Kerberos pre-authentication failed
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Kerberos Authentication Failures on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND NOT when the event(s) were detected by one or more of UBA : Trusted Log Source Group
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5000581) Failure Audit: A Kerberos authentication ticket (TGT) was rejected, (5000584) Failure Audit: Kerberos pre-authentication failed
